review.correctedDescriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes beat Pembroke Lumber Kings 9-3 in the Centennial Cup semifinal to set up a championship final grudge match against Humboldt Broncos on Saturday.
review.correctedDescriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Pembroke Lumber Kings 9-3 in the Centennial Cup semifinal on Thursday at the Uniplex, advancing to the championship final against the Humboldt Broncos at 7:30 p.m. Saturday. The final will be the ninth meeting between the two teams in less than three weeks, with the Centennial Cup title now on the line. Coach Orland Kurtenbach acknowledged the team's grueling three-week road schedule but said the Sockeyes are exactly where they are supposed to be, stressing the need to focus for the championship.
review.notes: OCR shows the page as 'Sports B13' while the filename attributes it as p29 — per instructions, filename-derived attribution is treated as reliable, but editor may wish to confirm. The headline matches the OCR exactly; no headline correction needed. Draft was largely accurate; corrections tighten the language and incorporate the 'ninth meeting / grudge series' framing central to the article.
